name: Scrolls of Spells
description: Magic-User spells set to parchment — 1, 2, 3, or 7 of them by the Scroll table — usable by any Magic-User who can read them, whatever the spell's level. Scroll spells work at the 6th level (or the minimum level needed, if higher). Roll a d6 per spell for its level, then dice among that level's spells. Per the errata: 25% of spell scrolls found contain spells usable by Clerics; and after a spell is read from a scroll the writing vanishes — each is usable once only.
